name: Crockpot Creamed Green Beans and Ham
recipeIngredient: 4 cans green beans, drained (15 ounces each)
1 can mushroom stems and pieces, drained (8 ounces) - optional
1 can fat-free evaporated skim milk (12 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray crock pot with nonfat cooking spray.
2. In the cooker, mix together the green beans, ham, mushrooms, evaporated milk, Butter Buds sprinkles, and cornstarch.
3. Cover and cook for 5 hours on low.
4. Serve hot.
Makes 12 (1/2 cup servings).
